wine_schools.name: Wine School Italia
wine_schools.description: WSET Approved Programme Provider in Florence, delivering Level 1, 2 and 3 Award in Wines in English. Classes held in central Florence with online learning available for distance students.
wine_schools.price_range: EUR 220 Level 1 to EUR 1100 Level 3 Award in Wines

wine_schools.name: Apicius International School of Hospitality Wine Programme
wine_schools.description: The School of Food and Wine Studies at Apicius offers academic and amateur wine programmes including Wine and Culture, Wine Expertise, and structured Tuscan winery tours with sommelier instruction.
wine_schools.price_range: EUR 90 amateur lesson to EUR 350 full Tuscan winery day

wine_schools.name: Italian Wine Scholar at Grape Tours Florence
wine_schools.description: Florence-based programme offering the Wine Scholar Guild's Italian Wine Scholar certification, the most rigorous Italian-specific wine credential. Two-unit study programme with examinations and an optional immersion day in Chianti Classico.
courses_offered: Italian Wine Scholar Unit 1 Northern Italy
Italian Wine Scholar Unit 2 Central and Southern Italy
Tuscan immersion day in Chianti Classico
wine_schools.price_range: EUR 650 single unit to EUR 1200 full IWS programme
certifications: Italian Wine Scholar (IWS) by Wine Scholar Guild

wine_schools.name: Vernaccia di San Gimignano Wine Experience School
wine_schools.address: Villa della Rocca di Montestaffoli, 53037 San Gimignano, Italy
wine_schools.description: Wine education programmes run by the Vernaccia consortium in the rooftop tasting room of the Rocca di Montestaffoli. Covers DOCG classification, grape identification and structured vertical sessions.
wine_schools.price_range: EUR 25 introductory to EUR 150 full-day programme
certifications: Consorzio Vernaccia di San Gimignano participation certificate

wine_schools.name: AIS Toscana Sommelier Course
wine_schools.description: The Tuscan delegation of the Associazione Italiana Sommelier offers the official three-level Italian sommelier qualification, with classes held across Florence and Siena. Recognised certification in Italy's hospitality industry.
courses_offered: AIS Sommelier Level 3 with diploma exam
